learningObjectives: Name family members and friends using core Starters vocabulary.
Use verb be (am, is, are) to describe people.
Use possessive adjectives my, your, his, her correctly.
Answer who-questions about people in pictures and short texts.
Introduce yourself and one family member in words and short phrases.
grammarFocus: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her

grammarReference.explanation: Use am with I; is with he, she, it and singular nouns; are with you, we, they and plural nouns.
commonMistakes: I is happy (×) → I am happy (✓)
She are my sister (×) → She is my sister (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her
grammarReference.explanation: Possessive adjectives come before a noun to show who something belongs to.
Use who to ask about a person.
commonMistakes: What is he? (when asking identity) → Who is he? (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Meet My Family
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and understand twelve family, friend and face words at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Family Word Match
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Your mother's husband is your _____.
questions.explanation: A father is the male parent. Learners often confuse father with friend because both start with f.

choices.distractorNote: Same initial letter; common confusion for young learners
Male family member but not a parent

questions.questionText: A girl in your class who you like is your _____.
questions.explanation: A friend is a person you know and like. Sister is also a girl but means a family member.

questions.questionText: You use these to see.
questions.explanation: Eyes are the body part used for seeing.

choices.distractorNote: On the head but not for seeing

questions.questionText: Match: 'This is my _____. She cooks dinner.'
questions.explanation: Mother is the female parent. The pronoun she helps identify the answer.

questions.questionText: A young male child is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy means a young male. Girl is the female equivalent; brother is a family role, not age.

questions.questionText: You smell with your _____.
questions.explanation: The nose is the body part used for smelling. Mouth is for eating; hair is on the head.

choices.distractorNote: Another face part; used for eating
Whole top of body, not for smelling

exercises.title: Practice: Match the Pairs
exercises.instructions: Match each word on the left with the correct meaning on the right.

questions.questionText: Match the family words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Each word matches one clear meaning. Brother and sister are often swapped by learners.

exercises.title: Check: Vocab Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer for each question.

questions.questionText: The part of your face above your eyes is your _____.
questions.explanation: Head là phần trên cơ thể bao gồm mặt. Hair chỉ là tóc trên đầu.

choices.distractorNote: On the head but not the whole top part

questions.questionText: A female child in a family is a _____.
questions.explanation: Sister là chị/em gái trong gia đình. Girl là cô bé nói chung, không nhấn mạnh quan hệ gia đình.

questions.questionText: You eat and talk with your _____.
questions.explanation: Mouth (miệng) dùng để ăn và nói. Nose dùng để ngửi.

questions.questionText: Long or short _____ grows on your head.
questions.explanation: Hair (tóc) mọc trên đầu. Head là cả phần đầu, không phải riêng tóc.

choices.distractorNote: Whole top part, not just hair
Not in unit word list; plausible trap

questions.questionText: My father's son who is not me is my _____.
questions.explanation: Brother là anh/em trai. Boy chỉ nói giới tính/tuổi, không nói quan hệ.

questions.questionText: She is a young _____. She is six years old.
questions.explanation: Girl (cô bé) phù hợp với she và tuổi nhỏ. Sister cần ngữ cảnh gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Family role; sentence does not say family
Adult; six years old does not fit

exercises.title: Apply: Words in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word from the unit.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is my [0]. | She is my [1]. | I see with my [2].
questions.explanation: mother (mẹ) — she phù hợp; friend (bạn) — she phù hợp; eyes (mắt) — dùng để nhìn.

content.template: This is my [0]. She is my [1]. I see with my [2].

questions.questionText: Complete: He is a [0]. | My [1] is kind. | Tom is my [2].
questions.explanation: boy (cậu bé) — he + young male; mother (mẹ) — thường được mô tả kind; friend (bạn) — Tom is my friend.

content.template: He is a [0]. My [1] is kind. Tom is my [2].

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Who Is Who?
lessons.learningObjective: Use am, is, are and possessive adjectives to talk about family and friends.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose am, is or are
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ Mai. I am seven years old.
questions.explanation: Use am with the pronoun I.

questions.questionText: She _____ my sister. Her name is Linh.
questions.explanation: Use is with she.

questions.questionText: They _____ my friends from school.
questions.explanation: Use are with they.

questions.questionText: _____ is your friend? The boy in the blue shirt.
questions.explanation: Who asks about a person. What asks about things.

exercises.title: Practice: My, Your, His, Her
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with my, your, his or her.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] mother. | [1] name is Hoa. | He loves [2] brother.
questions.explanation: my before mother (I talk about myself); Her before name (mother is she); his before brother (he loves his brother).

content.template: This is [0] mother. [1] name is Hoa. He loves [2] brother.

exercises.title: Check: Grammar Challenge
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word. Think carefully before you answer.

questions.questionText: You _____ my friend. Thank you!
questions.explanation: Dùng are với you. Is chỉ dùng với he/she/it.

questions.questionText: This is Linh. _____ brother is ten.
questions.explanation: Linh là nữ → dùng Her (của cô ấy). His dùng cho nam.

questions.questionText: _____ is that man? He is my father.
questions.explanation: Who hỏi về người. Where hỏi về địa điểm.

questions.questionText: Tom and I _____ happy. We are friends.
questions.explanation: Tom and I = we → dùng are. Is không dùng với chủ ngữ số nhiều.

exercises.title: Apply: Build the Sentence
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order to make a sentence.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: She / my / is / sister.
questions.explanation: Thứ tự đúng: She is my sister. Động từ is đứng sau chủ ngữ She.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: Who / your / is / friend?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi Who đứng đầu: Who is your friend?

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / am / eight / years / old.
questions.explanation: I am + tuổi: I am eight years old.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: My Family Photo
lessons.learningObjective: Read a short text about a family and answer questions about main idea, details and vocabulary.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Mai's Family
exercises.instructions: Read the text carefully. Answer the two detail questions.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: How old is Mai?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói: I am eight years old.

questions.questionText: How old is Mai's brother?
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói: He is six.

exercises.title: Practice: People in the Text
exercises.instructions: Read the text again. Answer about people and words in context.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: In the sentence 'Her eyes are brown', what does her refer to?
questions.explanation: Her chỉ mẹ (mother) trong câu trước.

questions.questionText: Why is Anna in the text?
questions.explanation: Anna được mô tả là bạn trong lớp, không phải thành viên gia đình.

choices.text: She is Mai's friend from class.

exercises.title: Check: Main Idea and Order
exercises.instructions: Read the text one more time. These questions need careful thinking.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Toàn bộ đoạn văn giới thiệu gia đình và bạn của Mai.

choices.text: Mai introduces her family and friend.
Mai talks about her favourite food.

questions.questionText: Put the ideas in order: (1) Mai tells her age (2) Mai describes parents (3) Mai mentions brother and friend
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn đi từ bản thân → bố mẹ → anh trai và bạn.

exercises.title: Apply: Match People to Facts
exercises.instructions: Use what you read. Match each person to the correct fact.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Match each person to a fact from the text.
questions.explanation: Mỗi người khớp với một chi tiết trong đoạn văn.

pairs.right: She is a girl in our class

lessons.title: Lesson 4: Introducing Friends
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to short family and friend introductions and identify names and relationships.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at Home
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation. Answer the first two questions.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is the woman in the photo?
questions.explanation: Minh nói: This is my mother.

questions.questionText: What is the boy's name?
questions.explanation: Minh nói: His name is Duc.

exercises.title: Practice: More from At Home
exercises.instructions: Listen again to the same conversation. Answer the next questions.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Replay same audio. Learners focus on second half.

questions.questionText: Who is Lily?
questions.explanation: Minh nói she is my friend, không phải sister.

questions.questionText: Minh says 'He is my brother.' Who is he?
questions.explanation: He chỉ cậu bé — anh trai Duc của Minh.

exercises.title: Check: Listen at School
exercises.instructions: Listen to a new conversation. Choose the correct answer.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Who is Lan?
questions.explanation: Hoa nói: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

questions.questionText: Who is the man?
questions.explanation: Hoa nói: He is my father.

questions.questionText: Is the boy Hoa's brother?
questions.explanation: Hoa trả lời Yes. He is my brother.

exercises.title: Apply: Match What You Heard
exercises.instructions: From the first conversation (At Home), match each person to the correct fact.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

questions.questionText: Match each person from the At Home dialogue.
questions.explanation: Mỗi người khớp với thông tin Minh nói trong hội thoại.

lessons.title: Lesson 5: Write About My Family
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases to introduce yourself and one family member using Starters vocabulary and grammar.

exercises.title: Learn: Complete the Sentences
exercises.instructions: Fill in each gap with my, mother, father, brother, sister or friend.

questions.questionText: Complete: I am Linh. This is [0] mother.
questions.explanation: my (của tôi) đứng trước mother khi nói về gia đình mình.

content.template: I am Linh. This is [0] mother.

questions.questionText: Complete: He is [0] brother. His name is Nam.
questions.explanation: my brother — anh/em trai của tôi.

content.template: He is [0] brother. His name is Nam.

questions.questionText: Complete: Anna is [0] friend from school.
questions.explanation: my friend — bạn của tôi.

exercises.title: Practice: Build Short Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order to make correct sentences.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence about your name.
questions.explanation: My name is Mai. — mẫu câu giới thiệu tên.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence about family.
questions.explanation: She is my mother. — dùng She + is + my + mother.

exercises.title: Check: Write About My Family
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Look at the picture of a family. Write short answers to the three questions.
prompts: 2. Who is the woman? (Write: my mother / my sister / my friend)
3. Write one sentence: My _____ is _____. (Use father, mother, brother, sister or friend)
content.expectedLength: 3 short answers; 1–5 words each; one sentence up to 8 words
successCriteria: Uses at least two unit vocabulary words
Uses am, is or are correctly in the sentence
Spelling of core words is recognisable

grammar.criteria: Correct use of am/is/are and possessive adjective before a noun.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses family or friend words from the unit accurately.

organization.criteria: Answers match the prompts in order; sentence is clear.

taskAchievement.criteria: All parts completed; length appropriate for Starters.

questions.questionText: Write your answers to the three prompts in the task.
questions.explanation: Chấp nhận câu trả lời đáp ứng tiêu chí. Model answer cho thấy phạm vi mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: Write About a Friend
exercises.instructions: Complete the short writing frames with your own words.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] name is Tom. | He is my [1]. | We are [2].
questions.explanation: His/Her name...; friend; happy — câu mẫu giới thiệu bạn.

content.template: [0] name is Tom. He is my [1]. We are [2].

lessons.title: Lesson 6: Talk About Your Family
lessons.learningObjective: Answer simple questions about yourself, family and friends with words and short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: Choose the Best Reply
exercises.instructions: Imagine someone asks you a question. Choose the best short answer.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What is your name? What do you say?
questions.explanation: My name is... là cách giới thiệu tên chuẩn ở Starters.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: How old are you? What do you say?
questions.explanation: I am + số tuổi. Dùng am với I.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: Who is he? (pointing to your father) What do you say?
questions.explanation: He is my father. — trả lời câu hỏi Who về người nam.

exercises.title: Practice: Who Is in the Picture?
exercises.instructions: Look at the family picture in your mind. Choose the correct answer.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: The woman with long hair is the _____.
questions.explanation: Trong ảnh gia đình, người phụ nữ thường là mother.

choices.distractorNote: Usually not the adult woman in family photo

questions.questionText: You want to say the boy is your brother. You say:
questions.explanation: He is my brother. — he cho nam, my brother cho quan hệ.

questions.questionText: The girl from class is your _____.
questions.explanation: from class → friend, không phải sister.

exercises.title: Check: Family Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions. Say at least one word for each question.

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about you and your family. Look at your family photo if you have one.
content.pictureDescription: A simple picture showing a mother, father, two children and a friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Who is he/she in the picture?
Is he/she your brother, sister or friend?
What colour is your mother's/your friend's hair?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Key family words (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) are understandable.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Responds without long silence; uses words or short phrases.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses am/is/are or my/his/her appropriately in at least two answers.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses at least three different unit words correctly.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the five follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời một phần vẫn được điểm một phần.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Answers
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase you would say in each situation.

questions.questionText: Point to your sister and introduce her. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister. — she cho nữ, sister cho chị/em gái.

questions.questionText: The examiner asks: Who is your friend? You say:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. — giới thiệu bạn gái bằng Her name is...

choices.distractorNote: Anna is typically a girl's name

questions.questionText: Say goodbye after talking about your family. Best phrase:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — kết thúc tích cực, dùng lại từ trong unit.
